column1: # HUBBARD U PARAMETERS — consolidated reference table (VASP-Flow defaults)
# Conditions: calibrated for PBE(-sol) GGA with PAW potentials; values are the
#   EFFECTIVE U (U_eff = U - J) of Dudarev's approach (VASP LDAUTYPE=2) unless
#   a nonzero J is listed (VASP applies U - J internally).
# Default policy (U_eV column): Materials Project fitted value where available
#   otherwise the midpoint of the linear-response (LR-cDFT) range.
# WARNING: do NOT carry these to meta-GGAs (SCAN/R2SCAN) or hybrids (HSE06)
#   without revalidation — those functionals already reduce self-interaction.
